pages.text: Ouma has a window box full of amazing flowers. Robyn wants to pick them all!

blocks.text: Ouma has a window box full of amazing flowers. Robyn wants to pick them all!

pages.text: Please don’t pick the flowers, Robyn! Ouma loves to see them when she opens her curtains.

blocks.text: Please don’t pick the flowers, Robyn! Ouma loves to see them when she opens her curtains.

pages.text: Butterflies dance around the petals. It’s so lovely to have these visitors.

blocks.text: Butterflies dance around the petals. It’s so lovely to have these visitors.

pages.text: The bees use the flowers to make delicious honey.

blocks.text: The bees use the flowers to make delicious honey.

pages.text: The flowers bring joy to everyone who walks past Ouma’s house.

blocks.text: The flowers bring joy to everyone who walks past Ouma’s house.

pages.text: The neighbour likes to smell them when he visits for tea.

blocks.text: The neighbour likes to smell them when he visits for tea.

pages.text: Sometimes, sunbirds drink the sweet nectar from the flowers.

blocks.text: Sometimes, sunbirds drink the sweet nectar from the flowers.

pages.text: Look, a tiny beetle! It shines in the sun. And there’s a fat caterpillar!

blocks.text: Look, a tiny beetle! It shines in the sun. And there’s a fat caterpillar!

pages.text: Please don’t pick Ouma’s flowers, Robyn! They won’t stay fresh very long.

blocks.text: Please don’t pick Ouma’s flowers, Robyn! They won’t stay fresh very long.

pages.text: “I won’t pick them, Ouma,” says Robyn, even though she really wants to. She feels a little bit sad!

blocks.text: “I won’t pick them, Ouma,” says Robyn, even though she really wants to.
She feels a little bit sad!

pages.text: Ouma doesn’t want Robyn to be sad. “Okay, Robyn,” says Ouma. “You can pick your favourite flower.”

blocks.text: Ouma doesn’t want Robyn to be sad.
“Okay, Robyn,” says Ouma. “You can pick your favourite flower.”

pages.text: “And I have an idea … Let’s plant more flowers together!”

blocks.text: “And I have an idea … Let’s plant more flowers together!”
